positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement featuring a stylized celestial navigation motif. The main elements include an interlocking pattern of abstract stars, crescent moons, constellations, and ethereal orbital rings. The composition must be centered and suitable for single-color screen printing or apparel printing, utilizing negative space dramatically. Style: Modern minimalist art meets psychedelic geometric engraving. Color Direction: Limited palette of deep navy, cosmic indigo, antique gold, and muted teal. Lighting: Flat, high contrast, crisp graphic quality. Composition: Perfect symmetry, repeating pattern suggestions at edges, clean outlines, perfect silhouette.
